title: Rose of the World
writer: Dorothy Farnum, Julien Josephson, Kathleen Norris
actors: Patsy Ruth Miller, Allan Forrest, Pauline Garon
plot: When rich Jack Talbot falls in love with not-rich Rose Kirby, he doesn't marry her, fearing his mother's disapproval. Rose later marries Clyde Bainbridge, a rotter who knows that under the terms of a secret contract, Rose will inh...
